name: GET /api/workflows/:slug - Fetch a workflow definition by slug
description: Operator-facing detail endpoint behind the admin-cockpit Workflows screen. Returns the canonical WorkflowDefinition — slug, name, description, ordered steps[], and terminal stages — for the lead-to-customer pipeline (and future workflows as the catalog grows). 404 when the slug does not match a registered workflow.
skipReason: Workflows live in lead-service on port 4011 (per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP); the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.
